complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Setup React Native Project with Expo
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the setup process into subtasks such as: installing prerequisites (Node.js, npm, Expo CLI), initializing the Expo project, creating the folder structure, initializing Git and .gitignore, installing dependencies (react-navigation, async-storage), and configuring ESLint/Prettier.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This is a foundational task with moderate complexity, involving several setup steps that are well-documented but require attention to detail. Each step is distinct and can be parallelized or assigned separately for clarity and efficiency.[2][3][5]

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into subtasks: install and configure Supabase, create sign-up screen, create sign-in screen, implement email/password auth, implement social auth, store session in AsyncStorage, implement token refresh logic.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Authentication involves multiple flows (email/password, social), secure storage, and session management, each requiring careful implementation and testing. Integrating with Supabase adds additional configuration and error handling complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Design and Implement User Onboarding Flow
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Subdivide into: design onboarding UI, implement multi-step form, collect workout experience, collect referral info, collect contact details, store onboarding data in Supabase.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: While onboarding is a common feature, the multi-step form, data validation, and integration with Supabase add moderate complexity. UI/UX design and navigation between steps also require attention.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: research app blocking feasibility on iOS/Android, detect installed apps, implement background checks, develop native modules if needed, store blocked app list in Supabase, sync blocked apps locally, handle app store compliance, test edge cases (termination, restart).
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task is highly complex due to OS-level restrictions, need for native code, compliance with app store policies, and robust testing across platforms. Research and custom native development are likely required.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into: install RevenueCat SDK, configure API keys, implement subscription plans, create subscription UI, handle purchase flow, validate receipts, sync subscription status with Supabase.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Subscription management involves third-party SDK integration, handling payments, UI for plans, receipt validation, and syncing with backend, each with its own set of challenges and required testing.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: implement 2D human model UI, integrate muscle group selection, develop/integrate AI workout generator, connect to ExerciseDB API, fetch exercise media, store plans in Supabase, implement offline caching, test plan quality.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task combines advanced UI, AI integration, third-party APIs, data storage, and offline support, making it technically demanding and requiring careful coordination between components.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Develop Workout Execution and Logging Functionality
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down into: design workout execution screens, implement exercise details display, create timer component, implement set/reps logging, sync logs with Supabase, cache data offline, test offline/real-time sync.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Workout execution involves real-time UI, state management, offline/online sync, and integration with backend, each requiring robust implementation and testing.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Progress Tracking and Calendar View
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into: integrate calendar library, fetch workout history, display history on calendar, implement streak tracking, create daily summary view, test UI responsiveness.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Progress tracking and calendar views are moderately complex, involving data visualization, UI integration, and logic for streaks and summaries.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Subdivide into: install react-native-health, implement read operations, implement write operations, handle permissions and privacy, sync health data with Supabase.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Apple Health integration is limited to iOS and involves permissions, data mapping, and syncing, but is well-supported by libraries, making it less complex than cross-platform or AI tasks.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: install Superwall SDK, configure account, design paywall variations, implement paywall triggers, integrate analytics tracking, test RevenueCat integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Paywall management involves SDK integration, UI/UX design, analytics, and coordination with subscription logic, each requiring focused implementation and testing.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Offline Mode and Data Syncing
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Expand into: choose offline storage solution, implement local data storage, develop sync mechanism, handle conflict resolution, implement background sync, test offline scenarios, test sync on reconnect, handle edge cases.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Offline mode and syncing are technically challenging, requiring robust data handling, conflict resolution, background processing, and comprehensive testing for reliability.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: audit authentication flows, audit data storage, audit API communications, implement secure storage, optimize performance (lazy loading, re-renders), optimize images, implement app loading improvements, conduct penetration testing, profile app performance.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: A full security audit and optimization is highly complex, requiring expertise in security, performance, and cross-cutting concerns across the entire app, with multiple areas needing specialized attention.
